meta.title: Alexis Herrera Saucedo | Frontend Developer
meta.description: Frontend Developer with 3+ years of experience building responsive and performant web applications with Vue, React, and Next.js. Portfolio and contact.

job1.description:
• Developed and maintained a POS cash management system using React, focused on daily transactional operations and reporting.
• Designed reusable and modular UI components to standardize form handling and reduce duplicated logic across the system.
• Implemented structured validation flows to minimize user input errors and improve operational accuracy.
• Managed shared state using Context API to ensure predictable data flow across different views.
• Integrated REST APIs for real-time transaction updates and data synchronization.
Achievements:
• Reduced development time by 30% through reusable component architecture.
• Increased form completion success rate by 40% due to improved validation and UX structure.

job2.description:
• Developed and enhanced a responsive government platform using Vue and Pinia, ensuring compatibility across desktop and mobile devices.
• Structured frontend modules to improve maintainability and reduce tight coupling between components.
• Integrated REST APIs to ensure consistent data management across different administrative sections.
• Participated in cross-functional collaboration to align frontend functionality with backend requirements.
Achievements:
• Restructured menus, improved file uploading, and optimized information editing, making the process more intuitive compared to the previous software version.
• Recognized for effectively organizing project structure and implementing code reuse strategies.
• Spearheaded the redesign and streamlining of the file upload process.

job3.description:
• Built ecommerce and service-based platforms using React, Next.js (SSR), and TypeScript.
• Implemented secure payment integrations with Stripe and Square, ensuring reliable transaction processing.
• Connected frontend applications with Strapi CMS and REST APIs to enable dynamic content management.
• Applied SEO optimization strategies using SSR and structured metadata configuration.
• Contributed to UI/UX improvements through Figma-based collaboration and iterative design updates.
Achievements:
• Led redesign of Codisa's ecommerce page, improving user experience with enhanced features.
• Created an efficient internal payment visualization interface for Forprint.
• Redesigned OurMaids' website, improving SEO and restructuring information.
• Integrated backend for Codisa, facilitating easy addition of banners or products and automated stock display.

job4.description:
• Developed a web platform using Vue, Nuxt.js, Vuex, and GraphQL, focusing on responsive design and usability.
• Implemented GraphQL-based real-time notifications to improve administrative monitoring.
• Designed and translated UI prototypes from Figma into production-ready interfaces.
• Supervised frontend development tasks and coordinated team activities as Department Manager.
• Supported performance improvements and structural refinements within the application.
Achievements:
• Optimized SEO (Website Impact Metrics) for 5–10 daily visits with fast load times.
• Developed a user-focused internal page for verification, streamlining control and report reviews.
• Implemented GraphQL notifications for instant real-time updates, improving admin efficiency.

technicalTests.title: Technical tests
technicalTests.subtitle: Sample projects and technical exercises: Todo List and E-commerce built with Vue and Angular.

hero.intro: Frontend Developer with 3+ years of experience building responsive and maintainable web applications with Vue, React, and Next.js. Focused on clean code, performance optimization, and practical solutions that improve user experience.
hero.highlights: 3+ years experience · 8+ projects · Vue · React · Next.js

about.title: About
about.paragraph1: Frontend Developer with over 3 years of experience building responsive and maintainable web applications using Vue, React, and Next.js. Experienced in integrating REST and GraphQL APIs, managing application state with Pinia, Vuex, and Context API, and developing reusable component-based interfaces.
about.paragraph2: I have worked on ecommerce platforms, internal management systems, and government websites, focusing on improving usability, optimizing workflows, and maintaining scalable code structures. Comfortable collaborating with backend teams to ensure reliable API integration and consistent data handling.
about.paragraph3: Focused on clean code, performance optimization, and delivering practical solutions that improve user experience and development efficiency.

codisa.title: CODISA E-Commerce
codisa.technologies: Vue · Nuxt.js · Vuetify · Pinia · GraphQL Apollo
codisa.description: Led the redesign of Codisa's e-commerce platform, improving user experience with enhanced features. Integrated backend for easy banner and product management with automated stock display. Includes shopping cart, secure authentication, multiple shipping addresses, order history, and wishlist functionality.

ourmaids.title: OurMaids
ourmaids.description: Redesigned OurMaids' website improving SEO and restructuring information architecture. Modern landing page and web platform for a cleaning service business with integrated payment solutions.

forprint.title: Forprint Backoffice
forprint.description: Created an efficient internal payment visualization interface for Forprint. Admin dashboard for managing bank transfer payments, accepting or declining transactions, and generating purchase invoices with streamlined workflows.

gmarLanding.title: Give Me A Ride Landing Page
gmarLanding.description: Designed and developed a user-centric marketing landing page with optimized SEO, achieving 5-10 daily visits with fast load times. Features terms and conditions, privacy policy, pricing plans, and FAQ sections.

gmarBackoffice.title: Give Me A Ride Backoffice
gmarBackoffice.description: Developed a user-focused internal verification page streamlining control and report reviews. Implemented GraphQL notifications for instant real-time updates, significantly improving admin efficiency and workflow.

pcppd.title: PCPPD
pcppd.description: Collaborative programming platform with GitHub integration for code editing, pull requests, and team communication.

todo.title: Todo List
todo.description: A simple todo list application built with Vue 3, Vite, and Pinia. It allows you to add, edit, and delete tasks.

ecommerce.title: Ecommerce
ecommerce.description: Ecommerce application built with Angular, Tailwind, PrimeNG, Firebase, and TypeScript. It allows you to add, edit, and delete products.

lacasagallery.title: La Casa Gallery
lacasagallery.description: Online art and gift gallery and store built with Shopify. Custom components implemented in Liquid. Collections, blog, and nationwide shipping.

roadStats.title: Statistics Information System
roadStats.description: Government platform for the SICT statistics information system. Bulk upload of Excel files with road length data, rail transport, and federal motor transport. From uploaded data, yearly statistics and downloadable reports are generated, with history from 1990 to 2023.

fintechBackoffice.title: Fintech Backoffice
fintechBackoffice.technologies: Vue 2 · Nuxt.js 2 · JavaScript · Vuetify · Axios · Vuex
fintechBackoffice.description: Internal fintech panel: company onboarding, client management, balance deposits and withdrawals. Per user: movements, linked cards, password and profile updates. Four roles, whitelist and card restrictions, card models and card orders. Operations: credits, refunds, commissions, dispersions, and withdrawals.

contact.title: Contact
contact.text: Open to new opportunities and collaborations. Feel free to reach out via the form below or connect on
contact.formSuccess: Thanks! I'll get back to you soon.
contact.formError: Something went wrong. Please try again or email me directly.
